build.//: Use the portable Dockerfile (build context = repo root so workspaces link). Set the service Root Directory to `/`.
build.//watch: Config-as-code overrides the dashboard watch patterns (which were malformed: a single comma-joined string that matched nothing, so apps/tour pushes silently skipped the prod deploy). Redeploy this service only when the tour app or a shared package changes.

deploy.//: Build + start (prisma db push → next start on $PORT) live in the Dockerfile.
